decisions.subject: Production pipeline

options_considered.label: novel-comic-recap-arc
options_considered.reason: User explicitly requested this pipeline and supplied novel project path plus arc id.

options_considered.label: generic animation pipeline
options_considered.reason: Could render animation, but lacks novel arc intake and spoiler-boundary contract.

decisions.reason: Matches user request and source structure exactly.

decisions.subject: Concept direction

options_considered.label: He Chose Her First
options_considered.reason: Strongest short-form hook and complete node coverage.

options_considered.label: The Luna Blanket Was On Another Woman
options_considered.reason: Excellent symbolic treatment but less immediate than the survival betrayal hook.

options_considered.label: She Signed With Her Left Hand
options_considered.reason: Strong agency angle but softens the opening shock.

decisions.reason: Recommended because it opens with the source-supported highest-intensity betrayal while preserving the severance landing.

decisions.subject: Creative renderer family

options_considered.label: Animation-first comic recap
options_considered.reason: Fits still comic panels, captions, bubbles, and controlled vertical motion.

options_considered.label: Cinematic trailer
options_considered.reason: Would imply true motion clips; video generation providers are unavailable and the requested format is recap drama.
options_considered.rejected_because: Wrong delivery character for available tools.

decisions.reason: Best match for one-arc comic recap with still-led images and motion overlays.

decisions.subject: Render runtime

options_considered.label: Remotion
options_considered.reason: Available; best fit for animated still panels, speech bubbles, phrase captions, and audio timing.

options_considered.label: HyperFrames
options_considered.reason: Could support HTML/GSAP kinetic typography, but it is unavailable on this machine.
options_considered.rejected_because: runtime not available on this machine

options_considered.label: FFmpeg-only
options_considered.reason: Available for simple concat/trim but weaker for controlled captions and comic bubbles.

decisions.reason: Recommended because Remotion is available and aligned with the pipeline default for comic-panel motion and overlay control.

decisions.subject: Narration voice provider

options_considered.label: Piper local TTS
options_considered.reason: Available and free, suitable for zero-key draft/presentable path.

options_considered.label: ElevenLabs TTS
options_considered.reason: Higher emotional quality but unavailable until API key setup.

options_considered.label: OpenAI TTS
options_considered.reason: Potential high quality but unavailable until API key setup.

decisions.reason: Only configured provider; keeps production zero-key unless user chooses an upgrade.

decisions.subject: Music and sound policy

options_considered.label: No added music
options_considered.reason: Matches visual style SOUND_POLICY and avoids melodrama.

options_considered.label: Pixabay Music
options_considered.reason: Available free/no-key search, but external scraping and less aligned with the cold style.

options_considered.label: ElevenLabs music generation
options_considered.reason: Could generate music but unavailable until API key setup.

decisions.reason: Style policy defaults to no added music; environmental audio can be considered later if needed.

decisions.subject: Motion requirement classification

options_considered.label: Still-led animated comic recap
options_considered.reason: Matches pipeline and available tools; motion comes from panel animation and overlays.

options_considered.label: True generated motion clips
options_considered.reason: No configured video generation providers and not necessary for this recap format.

decisions.reason: The delivery promise can be presentable with animated still panels, so true motion is not a hard requirement.
